topic: How Recruitment Agencies Are Cutting CV Screening Time in Half With AI

manual_inputs.Topic: How Recruitment Agencies Are Cutting CV Screening Time in Half With AI
manual_inputs.Secondary Keywords:
AI CV screening recruitment agency	
AI candidate shortlisting · automate recruitment sourcing · executive search AI tools · recruitment agency AI automation · faster placement AI
manual_inputs.Target Persona: Sarah/James — The Compliance-Aware Growth COO (Recruitment: Managing Partner / Founder, executive search or specialist staffing, 50–200 employees, USA/UK, placement speed is primary KPI)
manual_inputs.Angle / Hook: Mirror Arsuno.ai's US recruitment company case study. The angle is competitive advantage — the firm that shortlists fastest wins the repeat business. Frame AI as a multiplier for consultants, not a replacement for relationship skills. Use the 2x faster project delivery and 50% client satisfaction improvement as the anchor stats.
manual_inputs.Internal Links: Arsuno.ai Smart Document Handling · AI Business Insights feature · Recruitment case study page
manual_inputs.Notes: Use the exact outcome stats: 2x faster project delivery, 50% improvement in client satisfaction. Reference 'Bullhorn' as an existing tool — signals stack awareness for recruitment ICPs. The 'human touch' anxiety (from David persona) applies here too — address it directly: AI handles the volume work, consultants handle the relationship. GDPR-compliant candidate data handling must appear before the CTA.
